
### Static, kinetec rest charge localisation (conservativ system):
$$\begin{split} &
\nabla \cdot \varepsilon_0 \mathscr{E} = \varrho \qquad \qquad \qquad \qquad
\nabla \cdot \mathscr{B} = 0 
\newline &
\nabla \times \mathscr{E} = -\frac{\partial}{\partial t} \mathscr{B} = i\omega\mathscr{B}  \qquad
\nabla \times \frac{1}{\mu_0} \mathscr{B} = j \cong \sigma\mathscr{E}
\newline &
\nabla \cdot j = 0
\end{split}$${#eq-EMF_vac_static}


Potentials:
$$
\Phi_e = ... \\
\mathscr{A} = ...
$$

Fields:
$$
\mathscr{E} = ... \\
\mathscr{B} = ...
$$
